examples: And even more important, Lycidas will continue to sing in heaven just as he had sung on earth, except now he can hear the unexpressive - that means "inexpressible" -- nuptial song.
It's not a particularly strong movie in terms of plot, action, or pacing. Its best dialog comes its most notable character, a computer portrayed as a disembodied voice and unexpressive camera lens.
But if you are not careful, it can be boring and unexpressive.
